004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
025
026/**
027 * Child-resource flavor of the static-files capability.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Mounts as a <b>routed child</b> via {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children=StaticFilesResource.class)}
031 * under a parent at the subtree {@code /static} and serves static files by delegating to the
032 * flavor-neutral {@link StaticFiles} worker bean resolved from the request context
033 * ({@link RestContext#getStaticFiles()}) &mdash; the same worker the {@link StaticFilesMixin mixin} and
034 * {@link StaticFilesServlet servlet} flavors use, so the three forms cannot drift.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Whereas the {@link StaticFilesMixin} mixin pins its op at {@code /static/*} to merge into a host's
038 * namespace, this child declares the subtree at the class level ({@link Rest#path() @Rest(path="/static")})
039 * and pins the ops at {@code /*} &mdash; the op must <b>not</b> re-pin {@code /static/*} or it would
040 * double-path to {@code /static/static/*} under the routed-subtree wiring.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='jc'>{@link StaticFilesMixin}
044 *    <li class='jc'>{@link StaticFilesServlet}
045 *    <li class='jc'>{@link StaticFiles}
046 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/StaticFiles">Static files</a>
047 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerCompositionMixinsAndPaths">REST Server &mdash; Mixins and Multi-Mount Paths</a>
048 * </ul>
049 *
050 * @since 10.0.0
051 */
052// @formatter:off
053@Rest(path="/static")
054public class StaticFilesResource extends RestResource {
055
056   /**
057    * [GET /*] &mdash; serve a static file from the active {@link StaticFiles} worker bean.
058    *
059    * @param req The current REST request &mdash; supplies {@link RestContext#getStaticFiles()}.
060    * @param path The trailing remainder after the mount prefix.
061    * @param locale The request locale (used for localized resource lookups).
062    * @return The matching {@link HttpResource} (with content type + cache headers).
063    * @throws NotFound If no resource matches the requested path.
064    */
065   @RestGet(
066      path="/*",
067      summary="Static files",
068      description="Static file retrieval.",
069      swagger=@OpSwagger(ignore=true)
070   )
071   public HttpResource getStaticFile(RestRequest req, @Path("/*") String path, Locale locale) {
072      return req.getContext().getStaticFiles().resolve(path, locale).orElseThrow(NotFound::new);
073   }
074
075   /**
076    * [HEAD /*] &mdash; return GET headers for a static file without the body.
077    *
078    * @param req The current REST request &mdash; supplies {@link RestContext#getStaticFiles()}.
079    * @param path The trailing remainder after the mount prefix.
080    * @param locale The request locale (used for localized resource lookups).
081    * @return The matching {@link HttpResource} (with headers; body suppressed by the processor).
082    * @throws NotFound If no resource matches the requested path.
083    */
084   @RestOp(
085      method="HEAD",
086      path="/*",
087      summary="Static files (HEAD)",
088      description="Static file metadata retrieval.",
089      swagger=@OpSwagger(ignore=true)
090   )
091   public HttpResource headStaticFile(RestRequest req, @Path("/*") String path, Locale locale) {
092      return getStaticFile(req, path, locale);
093   }
094}
